biography_short: Personaje vinculado en las fuentes al episodio de la batalla frente a los rebeldes; figura asociada a las facciones witizianas en la narrativa.

visual_profile.clothing: noble's tunic, decorative but not ostentatious
visual_profile.style_notes: represent as a member of the local visigothic elite, possibly cooperating with Muslim forces per some traditions.

must_keep: Appears in battle accounts alongside Muslim commanders (suggesting alignment with witiziano/Agila party)
must_avoid: Ascribing motivations beyond the text (e.g., personal betrayal reasons not present in the source)

emotional_state.trigger_summary: Political factionalism and alignment with external forces create tension around his figure.

arc_state.external_goal: support witiziano claims and preserve factional influence
arc_state.contradiction: alignment with invaders vs. legitimacy among local populace
arc_state.change_vector: participation in major battle events; later disappearance from central narrative
